languages.original_text: "Pain and an unquenchable thirst for life... This ship reminds me more and more of a true reflection of mon-keigh nature."

languages.text: "Боль и неутолимая жадность к жизни... Это корабль все больше напоминает мне истинное отражение природы мон-каев".
"Pain and an unquenchable thirst for life... This ship reminds me more and more of a true reflection of mon-keigh nature."
languages.original_text: "Боль и неутолимая жадность к жизни... Это корабль все больше напоминает мне истинное отражение природы мон-каев".

traits.locale_text: "Pain and an unquenchable thirst for life... This ship reminds me more and more of a true reflection of mon-keigh nature."
"Pain and an unquenchable thirst for life... This ship reminds me more and more of a true reflection of mon-keigh nature."
"Pain and an unquenchable thirst for life... This ship reminds me more and more of a true reflection of mon-keigh nature."

languages.text: 「痛みと、渇きを癒すことのない生命への渇望…この船は、モンケイグの真の姿を映し出す鏡だ」
languages.original_text: "Pain and an unquenchable thirst for life... This ship reminds me more and more of a true reflection of mon-keigh nature."

traits.locale_text: 「痛みと、渇きを癒すことのない生命への渇望…この船は、モンケイグの真の姿を映し出す鏡だ」

languages.text: « La douleur et une soif inextinguible de vie... Ce vaisseau reflète de plus en plus fidèlement la nature des mon-keigh. »
languages.original_text: "Pain and an unquenchable thirst for life... This ship reminds me more and more of a true reflection of mon-keigh nature."

traits.locale_text: « La douleur et une soif inextinguible de vie... Ce vaisseau reflète de plus en plus fidèlement la nature des mon-keigh. »

languages.text: "Schmerz und ein unstillbarer Lebensdurst ... Dieses Schiff erinnert mich mehr und mehr an eine Reflexion des Wesens der Chem-Pan-Sey."
languages.original_text: "Pain and an unquenchable thirst for life... This ship reminds me more and more of a true reflection of mon-keigh nature."

traits.locale_text: "Schmerz und ein unstillbarer Lebensdurst ... Dieses Schiff erinnert mich mehr und mehr an eine Reflexion des Wesens der Chem-Pan-Sey."

languages.text: "Acı ve dindirilemez bir yaşam susuzluğu... Bu gemi bana giderek daha fazla mon-keigh doğasının gerçek bir yansımasını hatırlatıyor."
languages.original_text: "Pain and an unquenchable thirst for life... This ship reminds me more and more of a true reflection of mon-keigh nature."

traits.locale_text: "Acı ve dindirilemez bir yaşam susuzluğu... Bu gemi bana giderek daha fazla mon-keigh doğasının gerçek bir yansımasını hatırlatıyor."

languages.text: «Dolor y un ansia insaciable por vivir... Esta nave se parece cada vez más a un verdadero reflejo de la naturaleza de los mon-keigh».
languages.original_text: "Pain and an unquenchable thirst for life... This ship reminds me more and more of a true reflection of mon-keigh nature."

traits.locale_text: «Dolor y un ansia insaciable por vivir... Esta nave se parece cada vez más a un verdadero reflejo de la naturaleza de los mon-keigh».

languages.text: “痛苦与对生命永不熄灭的渴望……这艘舰船倒让我觉得，它越发像是猴子本性的真实写照。”
languages.original_text: "Pain and an unquenchable thirst for life... This ship reminds me more and more of a true reflection of mon-keigh nature."

traits.locale_text: “痛苦与对生命永不熄灭的渴望……这艘舰船倒让我觉得，它越发像是猴子本性的真实写照。”
